meaning: n.经济学者,经济家,[古]节俭的人,节约者
examples: In view of the fact that Hobson was not a trained economist his achievements were remarkable.
You are an economist, so how does it influence your work?
Good news is also seen by David Malpass, chief economist for Bear Stearns .
Michael Pento is chief economist at Delta Global Advisors and a contributor to greenfaucet.com.
